---
title: |
  | Report title line 1
  | Report title line 2
  | Report title line 3
title-short: "Short title for headers"
author:
  - "LastName, F."
  - "N. LastName"
  - "I. LastName"
year: 2026
report-number: "01"

fws-region: "Alaska"  # optional; if omitted, defaults to Alaska

cover-image: "images/cover.jpg"
cover-image-credit: "Photo Caption / FWS"
cover-caption: "Image caption goes here"

doi: "10.1234/unique-doi"

format:
    refuge-template-pdf: default
---

# Abstract

Limit to 300 words.

# Keywords

Species names, locations, methods, analysis, interpretations (alphabetical order)

# Introduction

Introductory text...

# Study Area

A description of the study area...

# Methods

Describe methods...

# Results

Results text...

# Discussion

Discussion text...

# Acknowledgements

# Data availability

# References
